login-tour.login-username: First, enter your LTS username. This is usually your employee ID or the username provided by your administrator.
login-tour.login-password: Next, enter your temporary password. You would have received this in your welcome email.
login-tour.login-button: Click the Log In button to access the system for the first time.
login-tour.password-new: Since this is your first login, you need to set a new password. Enter a password that meets the requirements shown below.
login-tour.password-confirm: Re-enter your new password here to confirm it matches.
login-tour.password-rules: Make sure your password follows all of these rules: at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one number, and one special character.
login-tour.password-submit: Click Submit to save your new password. You will then be taken to the User Details page.

user-details-tour.user-first-name: Verify your first name is correct. Update it if needed.
user-details-tour.user-last-name: Verify your last name. This should match your official records.
user-details-tour.user-email: Enter or update your email address. This will be used for system notifications and password resets.
user-details-tour.user-phone: Enter your phone number. This is optional but helpful for account recovery.
user-details-tour.user-department: Select your department from the dropdown. This determines which modules and reports you can access.
user-details-tour.user-role: Your role is displayed here. It is set by your administrator and controls your permissions in the system.
user-details-tour.user-save: Once all details are correct, click Save Changes. You will be redirected to the LTS Home page.

home-tour.home-header: This is the LTS header bar. It appears on every page and gives you quick access to the main sections of the system.
home-tour.home-nav: Use the navigation links to move between different areas: Home, Reports, Documents, and Help.
home-tour.home-news: The News and Announcements section shows important updates, system changes, and training reminders.
home-tour.home-quick-links: Quick Links give you one-click access to the most commonly used tools: Service Requests, 6NA forms, Reports, and Documents.
home-tour.home-sr-link: Click here to access the Service Request module, where you can create and track support tickets.
home-tour.home-6na-link: Click here to open the 6NA forms section for compliance and audit-related submissions.

help-tour.help-contact: If you need assistance, here are the main support contacts for the LTS system.
help-tour.help-email: For non-urgent questions, send an email to the LTS support team.
help-tour.help-phone: For urgent issues, call the support hotline during business hours.
help-tour.help-documents: The Documents section contains user guides, training manuals, and reference materials you can download.
help-tour.help-faq: Check the FAQ section for answers to common questions about the system before contacting support.
